subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the chalice of divine utterance! Thy letter was received, and its contents brought sorrow to hearts and caused sighs and lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مست جام کلام الهی عریضه شما واصل و مضمون قلوب را محزون نمود و آه و فغان از
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @growth of the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
